name: Kung Pao Chicken - Gungbao Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the chicken and marinate it with 2 tablespoons soy sauce, cornstarch, and rice wine. Marinate for 30 minutes.
2. Cut scallions into 1-inch pieces and halve the dried chiles (if using small ones).
3. Heat oil in a large pan and deep fry the chicken pieces for 2 minutes. Remove and drain well.
4. Reheat the oil and fry peanuts for 3 minutes. Remove and drain.
5. In a separate pan, heat 3 tablespoons oil. Stir-fry ginger, scallions, and chiles for about 1 minute.
6. Add the chicken pieces back to the pan and stir-fry for another minute.
7. Stir in 2 tablespoons soy sauce and sugar. Adjust seasonings as desired.
8. Stir in the peanuts and sprinkle with sesame oil before serving.
Note: This recipe assumes the use of raw peanuts. If using roasted peanuts, omit the deep frying step.
